title: Dependency Sweeper Claim Contract
description: Implement claim-only lifecycle evidence for Dependency Sweeper Issue Fix Requests without starting repair work.

decisions.q: Does Dependency Sweeper claim start dependency repair work?
decisions.answer: No. This slice only records claim lifecycle evidence by transitioning an existing Issue Fix Request from requested to consumed.

decisions.q: Which lifecycle contract owns claim state?
decisions.answer: Use the existing Issue Fix Request lifecycle contract and append a consumed lifecycle event rather than adding a separate dependency state machine.

nodes.label: Deterministic claim replay and tests
nodes.commit_intent: Add dependency-sweeper claim replay and tests.
nodes.notes: Implemented scripts/dependency-sweeper-claim-e2e-replay.mjs and scripts/dependency-sweeper-claim-e2e-replay.test.mjs. Verification passed: npm run test:dependency-sweeper-claim.

nodes.label: Route docs and gates alignment
nodes.commit_intent: Wire dependency-sweeper claim docs, package scripts, and CI gates.
nodes.verification_gate: npm run test:route-decision && npm run validate:registry
nodes.notes: Updated package scripts, CI validation gates, route table guards, Route Table Architecture, ZJ-LOOP dogfood status, dependency sweeper testing docs, Issue Fix Request testing docs, and route evolution checklist. Verification passed: npm run test:dependency-sweeper-route && npm run test:route-decision.

nodes.label: Closeout and PR handoff evidence
nodes.commit_intent: Delete process roadmap files after durable docs absorb decisions.
nodes.notes: Final verification passed before feature commit: git diff --check, npm run test:dependency-sweeper-claim, npm run test:dependency-sweeper-route, npm run test:route-decision, npm run test:issue-fix-request, npm run validate:registry, npm run check:zj-loop-init, and bash scripts/ci-validate-gates.sh. First ci-validate attempt failed on sandbox DNS for registry.npmmirror.com; rerun with network permission passed. Closeout commit remains pending.
